results.matched_effect_cluster: ALMC adaptive multi-agent role + periodic switching

Puppeteer orchestrator + specialist agents IS the Salgan-9 consensus + class-rotation coordination paradigm.

EXACT TWIN — Multi-Agent LLM with rotating-specialization governance + power-sharing IS the GADA rotating governance paradigm.
